chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 60, 61 & 62 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference as notices not issued as appl: counsel not supply copies not pay the process fee 02.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Abbas advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Adnan Moton, advocate for the applicant These matters are pending since 2015 without any progress and remained listed for orders as to non-prosecution. On 09.09.2016 following order was passed: “09.09.2016 Mr. Adnan Moton, Adv. 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2. Counsel for the applicant requests for time to prepare the case. Adjourned, as requested” On 20.01.2021 following order was passed: “20.01.2021 Mr. Muhammad Adnan Moton, advocate for applicant Counsel for the applicant needs time to fully prepare his brief. At his request time allowed. Adjourned. Office to place copy of this order in connected reference applications” Even today, 11 years later, brief is being held and adjournment sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters.
